source_events.label: Chonburi anniversary lecture as Smart City advisor to Mayor

notes: Pre-Phase material: filed forward from project Day 3 to Phase 6 Day 72 (smart-city work / client behind it / belief gap). Two source events combined: (1) Chonburi anniversary lecture 2026-05-22 — 14 photos + raw Thai transcript (240 lines) + summary, establishes depa/SEIC/UNL FunIT Global affiliation and the 4P framework; (2) Chulalongkorn Vice-Rector meeting 2026-05-27 — 2 photos + raw Thai transcript + summary, establishes the 20-year MIT arc (Fulbright talk → MIT → today's AI Center directorship offer), the no-localhost shipping principle, the SLIC engagement vehicle, and the third live municipal engagement on the same substrate.
